subject: Githyanki ambush
fact: Two Githyanki warriors emerge from the muck to ambush the party.
source_quote: Two Githyanki warriors emerge from the muck to ambush the party

subject: Thera flees
fact: Thera turns invisible and attempts to flee.
source_quote: Thera turns invisible and attempts to flee

subject: Githyanki surprise round
fact: The Githyanki launch a surprise round, striking at the Owlbear and other party members.
source_quote: The Githyanki launch a surprise round, striking at the Owlbear and other party members

subject: Owlbear retaliates
fact: The Owlbear retaliates with powerful strikes against one of the warriors.
source_quote: The Owlbear retaliates with powerful strikes against one of the warriors

subject: Owlbear targeted
fact: The Owlbear is targeted by a psychic blast.
source_quote: before being targeted by a psychic blast

subject: Felkur casts Firebolt
fact: Felkur hurls a Firebolt at the attackers.
source_quote: Felkur hurls a Firebolt at the attackers

subject: Akritas slays Githyanki
fact: Akritas slays one of the Githyanki warriors.
source_quote: Akritas slays one of the Githyanki warriors

subject: Intellect Devourer emerges
fact: A horrific four-legged brain creature — an Intellect Devourer — bursts from the fallen enemy's skull.
source_quote: a horrific four-legged brain creature — an Intellect Devourer — to burst from the fallen enemy's skull

subject: Intellect Devourer mind blast
fact: The Intellect Devourer uses a mind blast that successfully stuns the Owlbear.
source_quote: The Intellect Devourer uses a mind blast that successfully stuns the Owlbear

subject: Owlbear incapacitated
fact: The Owlbear is left incapacitated by the mind blast.
source_quote: leaving the sidekick incapacitated

subject: Akritas marks Devourer
fact: Akritas places Hunter's Mark on the Intellect Devourer.
source_quote: Akritas places Hunter's Mark on the Intellect Devourer

subject: Akritas strikes Devourer
fact: Akritas strikes the Intellect Devourer, leaving it clinging to life.
source_quote: and strikes it, leaving it clinging to life

subject: Bramgrim summons Guardian
fact: Bramgrim summons a Guardian of Faith to hold the line.
source_quote: Bramgrim summons a Guardian of Faith to hold the line

subject: Guardian strikes Devourer
fact: The Guardian of Faith strikes the Intellect Devourer.
source_quote: which strikes the Intellect Devourer

subject: Devourer reduced to 1 HP
fact: The Guardian of Faith reduces the Intellect Devourer to a single hit point.
source_quote: and reduces it to a single hit point

subject: Githyanki escapes
fact: The remaining Githyanki warrior uses Misty Step to escape the party's reach.
source_quote: The remaining Githyanki warrior uses Misty Step to escape the party's reach

subject: Session conclusion
fact: The session ends with the Intellect Devourer barely alive.
source_quote: The session ends with the Intellect Devourer barely alive

subject: Thera status at end
fact: The session ends with Thera invisible and fleeing.
source_quote: Thera invisible and fleeing

subject: Rogue Mind Flayer's Lair
fact: The Rogue Mind Flayer's Lair is a dark, unsettling complex deep in the Underdark.
source_quote: A dark, unsettling complex deep in the Underdark

subject: Rogue Mind Flayer's Lair
fact: The lair contains surgical remains.
source_quote: containing surgical remains

subject: Rogue Mind Flayer's Lair
fact: The lair contains detailed maps of surface cities.
source_quote: detailed maps of surface cities

subject: Rogue Mind Flayer's Lair
fact: The lair contains stone brain basins that serve as door mechanisms.
source_quote: stone brain basins that serve as door mechanisms

subject: Rogue Mind Flayer's Lair
fact: The lair has narrow hallways that restrict large creatures like the Owlbear.
source_quote: narrow hallways that restrict large creatures like the Owlbear

subject: Sporedome
fact: The Sporedome is a location in the Underdark where the party had a brief rest.
source_quote: A location in the Underdark where the party had a brief rest

subject: Sporedome
fact: The party was summoned from the Sporedome to meet with the mind flayer Glor.
source_quote: before being summoned to meet with the mind flayer Glor

subject: The Humid Chamber
fact: The Humid Chamber is a stale, humid room within the rogue's lair.
source_quote: A stale, humid room within the rogue's lair

subject: The Humid Chamber
fact: The Humid Chamber is covered in slick moss and fungus.
source_quote: covered in slick moss and fungus

subject: The Humid Chamber
fact: The Humid Chamber has several large orbs bobbing in the air.
source_quote: with several large orbs bobbing in the air

subject: The Humid Chamber
fact: The Humid Chamber contained a brain basin.
source_quote: It contained a brain basin

subject: The Humid Chamber
fact: The Humid Chamber contained hidden Githyanki warriors.
source_quote: hidden Githyanki warriors

subject: The Humid Chamber
fact: The Humid Chamber contained the deceptive Duergar Thera Grabelthum buried beneath debris.
source_quote: the deceptive Duergar Thera Grabelthum buried beneath debris

subject: Glor
fact: Glor is a mind flayer representing the Ryxyg Illithid encampment.
source_quote: A mind flayer representing the Ryxyg Illithid encampment

subject: Glor
fact: Glor claims his community has chosen peaceful coexistence.
source_quote: who claims his community has chosen peaceful coexistence

subject: Glor
fact: Glor hired the party to hunt a rogue mind flayer.
source_quote: He hired the party to hunt a rogue mind flayer

subject: Glor
fact: Glor provided the party with a map to the rogue's lair.
source_quote: and provided them with a map to the rogue's lair

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz is a drow acquaintance from the party's past.
source_quote: A drow acquaintance from the party's past

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz was found tied to a post and being tormented by Githyanki.
source_quote: found tied to a post and being tormented by Githyanki

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz bears distinct facial scars from a past affliction.
source_quote: He bears distinct facial scars from a past affliction

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz was suffering from magically induced madness when found.
source_quote: was suffering from magically induced madness when found

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz was cured with a magical mushroom.
source_quote: After being cured with a magical mushroom

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz agreed to travel alongside the party for a time through the Underdark.
source_quote: he agreed to travel alongside the party for a time through the Underdark

subject: Githyanki Knight
fact: The Githyanki Knight is a formidable leader of the Githyanki patrol.
source_quote: A formidable leader of the Githyanki patrol

subject: Githyanki Knight
fact: The Githyanki Knight wears ornate exotic armor.
source_quote: wearing ornate exotic armor

subject: Githyanki Knight
fact: The Githyanki Knight wields a massive silvery greatsword.
source_quote: wielding a massive silvery greatsword

subject: Githyanki Knight
fact: The Githyanki Knight used Misty Step to reposition during combat.
source_quote: He used Misty Step to reposition during combat

subject: Githyanki Knight
fact: The Githyanki Knight escaped by casting Plane Shift.
source_quote: ultimately escaped by casting Plane Shift

subject: Githyanki Knight
fact: The Githyanki Knight left behind a clear threat that the party had made a permanent enemy.
source_quote: leaving behind a clear threat that the party had made a permanent enemy

subject: Githyanki Warriors
fact: The Githyanki Warriors are green-skinned humanoid soldiers.
source_quote: Green-skinned humanoid soldiers

subject: Githyanki Warriors
fact: The Githyanki Warriors are ancient enemies of Mind Flayers.
source_quote: ancient enemies of Mind Flayers

subject: Githyanki Warriors
fact: The Githyanki Warriors were tormenting Arrizz.
source_quote: who were tormenting Arrizz

subject: Githyanki Warriors
fact: The Githyanki Warriors ambushed the party from within the fungal chamber.
source_quote: and later ambushed the party from within the fungal chamber

subject: Githyanki Warriors
fact: The Githyanki Warriors are described as arrogant and hostile.
source_quote: They are described as arrogant and hostile

subject: Githyanki Warriors
fact: The Githyanki Warriors view other races as subservient.
source_quote: viewing other races as subservient

subject: Thera Grabelthum
fact: Thera Grabelthum is a Duergar.
source_quote: A Duergar

subject: Thera Grabelthum
fact: Thera Grabelthum initially claimed to be an innocent traveler captured by Githyanki.
source_quote: who initially claimed to be an innocent traveler captured by Githyanki

subject: Thera Grabelthum
fact: Thera Grabelthum was revealed under intimidation to be a spy working for the Zhentarim Black Network.
source_quote: but was revealed under intimidation to be a spy working for the Zhentarim Black Network

subject: Thera Grabelthum
fact: Thera Grabelthum possesses the ability to turn invisible.
source_quote: She possesses the ability to turn invisible

subject: Thera Grabelthum
fact: Thera Grabelthum attempted to flee during the ambush.
source_quote: and attempted to flee during the ambush

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear is the party's loyal sidekick.
source_quote: The party's loyal sidekick

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear struggled to fit through the narrow hallways of the lair.
source_quote: who struggled to fit through the narrow hallways of the lair

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear was heavily struck by the Githyanki Knight.
source_quote: He was heavily struck by the Githyanki Knight

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear was later stunned by the Intellect Devourer's mind blast.
source_quote: and later stunned by the Intellect Devourer's mind blast

subject: Intellect Devourer
fact: The Intellect Devourer is a horrific creature resembling a brain with four feline legs.
source_quote: A horrific creature resembling a brain with four feline legs

subject: Intellect Devourer
fact: The Intellect Devourer burst from the skull of a slain Githyanki warrior.
source_quote: that burst from the skull of a slain Githyanki warrior

subject: Intellect Devourer
fact: The Intellect Devourer used a powerful mind blast that successfully stunned the Owlbear during combat.
source_quote: It used a powerful mind blast that successfully stunned the Owlbear during combat

subject: Brain Basin
fact: Brain Basins are stone basins shaped like the underside of a human brain.
source_quote: Stone basins shaped like the underside of a human brain

subject: Brain Basin
fact: Brain Basins serve as macabre key mechanisms for sealed doors within the rogue mind flayer's lair.
source_quote: serving as macabre key mechanisms for sealed doors within the rogue mind flayer's lair

subject: Brain Basin
fact: The party discovered multiple Brain Basins.
source_quote: The party discovered multiple such basins

subject: Brain Basin
fact: The party recognized that actual brains would be needed to open the corresponding doors.
source_quote: and recognized that actual brains would be needed to open the corresponding doors

subject: Magical Mushroom
fact: The Magical Mushroom is a special fungal specimen carried by the party.
source_quote: A special fungal specimen carried by the party

subject: Magical Mushroom
fact: The Magical Mushroom was used to cure magically induced madness.
source_quote: and used to cure magically induced madness

subject: Magical Mushroom
fact: The Magical Mushroom successfully restored Arrizz's sanity and calculating demeanor.
source_quote: It successfully restored Arrizz's sanity and calculating demeanor

subject: Magical Mushroom
fact: The Magical Mushroom appeared to have no effect when given to Thera Grabelthum.
source_quote: but appeared to have no effect when given to Thera Grabelthum

subject: Silvery Greatsword
fact: The Silvery Greatsword is a massive, ornate blade carried by the Githyanki Knight.
source_quote: A massive, ornate blade carried by the Githyanki Knight

subject: Silvery Greatsword
fact: The Silvery Greatsword was used to deliver powerful blows against the Owlbear during the skirmish in the lair.
source_quote: used to deliver powerful blows against the Owlbear during the skirmish in the lair

subject: Glor's Map
fact: Glor's Map is a map provided by the mind flayer Glor.
source_quote: A map provided by the mind flayer Glor

subject: Glor's Map
fact: Glor's Map was provided to guide the party through the Underdark to the rogue mind flayer's hideout.
source_quote: to guide the party through the Underdark to the rogue mind flayer's hideout

subject: Glor's Map
fact: Glor's Map was referenced in the session recap.
source_quote: referenced in the session recap

subject: Spirit Guardians cast
fact: Bramgrim casts Spirit Guardians, summoning spectral spirits that swirled around him in a fifteen-foot radius.
source_quote: Cast by Bramgrim, this spell summoned spectral spirits that swirled around him in a fifteen-foot radius

subject: Spirit Guardians damage
fact: The spectral spirits seared several Githyanki warriors with holy energy.
source_quote: searing several Githyanki warriors with holy energy

subject: Spirit Guardians effect
fact: The spectral spirits halved the speed of those who failed their saving throws.
source_quote: and halving the speed of those who failed their saving throws

subject: Spiritual Weapon summoned
fact: Bramgrim summons a Spiritual Weapon as a bonus action.
source_quote: Summoned by Bramgrim as a bonus action

subject: Spiritual Weapon description
fact: The Spiritual Weapon is a floating spectral weapon.
source_quote: this floating spectral weapon was conjured

subject: Spiritual Weapon action
fact: The Spiritual Weapon was conjured to strike at enemies from a distance during the battle with the Githyanki.
source_quote: to strike at enemies from a distance during the battle with the Githyanki

subject: Toll the Dead cast
fact: Bramgrim uses Toll the Dead, a dark cantrip, to inflict necrotic damage on a wounded Githyanki warrior.
source_quote: A dark cantrip used by Bramgrim to inflict necrotic damage on a wounded Githyanki warrior

subject: Toll the Dead context
fact: Toll the Dead was used during the skirmish.
source_quote: during the skirmish

subject: Guardian of Faith cast
fact: Bramgrim casts Guardian of Faith to summon a large spectral guardian.
source_quote: Cast by Bramgrim to summon a large spectral guardian

subject: Guardian of Faith action
fact: The Guardian of Faith automatically struck out at enemies moving within its reach.
source_quote: that automatically struck out at enemies moving within its reach

subject: Guardian of Faith damage
fact: The Guardian of Faith dealt significant damage to the Intellect Devourer.
source_quote: dealing significant damage to the Intellect Devourer

subject: Hunter's Mark used
fact: Akritas uses Hunter's Mark to magically mark Githyanki warriors.
source_quote: Used by Akritas to magically mark Githyanki warriors

subject: Hunter's Mark target change
fact: Akritas later used Hunter's Mark to mark the Intellect Devourer.
source_quote: and later the Intellect Devourer

subject: Hunter's Mark effect
fact: Hunter's Mark allows the user to track targets and deal increased damage with their strikes.
source_quote: allowing her to track targets and deal increased damage with her strikes

subject: Misty Step usage
fact: The Githyanki warriors and knight used Misty Step repeatedly to instantly teleport short distances across the battlefield.
source_quote: Used repeatedly by the Githyanki warriors and knight to instantly teleport short distances across the battlefield

subject: Misty Step effect
fact: Misty Step allowed the Githyanki to bypass the party's front line.
source_quote: allowing them to bypass the party's front line

subject: Misty Step reposition
fact: Misty Step allowed the Githyanki to reposition.
source_quote: reposition

subject: Misty Step escape
fact: Misty Step allowed the Githyanki to attempt to escape.
source_quote: and ultimately attempt to escape

subject: Plane Shift cast
fact: The Githyanki Knight uses Plane Shift, a powerful spell, to vanish entirely from the material plane.
source_quote: A powerful spell used by the Githyanki Knight to vanish entirely from the material plane

subject: Plane Shift result
fact: The Githyanki Knight escaped the party using Plane Shift.
source_quote: and escape the party

subject: Firebolt cast
fact: Felkur casts Firebolt against the Githyanki ambushers in the fungal chamber.
source_quote: Cast by Felkur against the Githyanki ambushers in the fungal chamber

subject: Firebolt result
fact: The Firebolt landed a hit.
source_quote: Despite landing a hit

subject: Firebolt damage
fact: The damage dealt by the Firebolt was unfortunately minimal.
source_quote: the damage dealt was unfortunately minimal

subject: Mind Blast used
fact: The Intellect Devourer uses Mind Blast, a psychic ability.
source_quote: A psychic ability used by the Intellect Devourer

subject: Mind Blast result
fact: The Mind Blast successfully stunned the Owlbear.
source_quote: that successfully stunned the Owlbear

subject: Mind Blast duration
fact: The Mind Blast left the Owlbear incapacitated for a round during the ambush in the fungal chamber.
source_quote: leaving the sidekick incapacitated for a round during the ambush in the fungal chamber

subject: Githyanki enmity
fact: The party has made a permanent enemy of the Githyanki Knight.
source_quote: leaving behind a clear threat that the party had made a permanent enemy
